chunks.title: Wisdom and Folly Contrasted
chunks.reason: A series of antithetical proverbs contrasting the wise and foolish in daily life.

chunks.title: The Heart's Condition
chunks.reason: Reflections on internal states, emotional satisfaction, and the consequences of one's path.

chunks.title: Discernment and Social Standing
chunks.reason: Proverbs regarding belief, fear of evil, anger, inheritance, and the social dynamics of wealth.

chunks.title: Compassion and Fear of Yahweh
chunks.reason: Instructions on treating the poor, the value of truth, and the security found in fearing God.

chunks.title: Leadership and Character
chunks.reason: Observations on kings, anger management, the body's health, and the impact of righteousness on society.
